title: Interface
description: Base ascription schema for Interface Ascriptions. Declarative exposure manifest: lists which Effector/Receptor ports are exposed. Interface has no behavior; realization is owned by Mechanisms. Tenant-defined archetypes extending Interface MUST reference this schema via allOf.

effectors.description: List of ID references to Effectors exposed by this Interface. All referenced Effectors and Receptors MUST belong to Mechanisms of a single Structure. A given Effector SHOULD be exposed by at most one Interface within a Structure.

receptors.description: List of ID references to Receptors exposed by this Interface. All referenced Effectors and Receptors MUST belong to Mechanisms of a single Structure. A given Receptor SHOULD be exposed by at most one Interface within a Structure.
